revision.comment: adding name= binary parameter to disable label per root template talk
revision.text:
<includeonly>{{unichar/main
| hval  ={{unichar/hexformat|{{{1|<#salted#>}}} }}
| hvalinput ={{{1|}}}<!--to use in errormessage-->
| na    = {{#if:{{{alias|}}} |  {{#invoke:unicode alias|alias|{{unichar/hexformat|{{{1|}}}}}}} | {{#invoke:unicode data|lookup|name|{{unichar/hexformat|{{{1|}}}}}}}}}
| ulink ={{{ulink|<#salted#>}}}
| nlink ={{{nlink|<#salted#>}}}
| image ={{{image|}}}
| cwith ={{#if:{{{cwith|}}} | {{{cwith}}} | {{#if:{{{cwith}}} ||   }} }}
| size  ={{#if:{{{image|}}} | {{#if:{{#invoke:String|endswith|1={{lc:{{{size|}}}}}|2=px}}|{{{size}}}|10px}} | {{{size|{{#if:{{{cwith}}}|125%|150%}}}}} }}
| use   ={{lc:{{{use|unicode}}}}}
| use2  ={{{use2|}}}
| dval  ={{hex2dec|{{unichar/hexformat|{{{1|<#salted#>}}} }}|no}}
| html  ={{#ifeq:{{{html|+}}}|{{{html|-}}}|yes|no}}
| note  ={{{note|}}}
| gc    ={{#if:{{{1|}}} |{{unichar/gc|{{hex2dec|{{{1|0}}}|no}}|hval={{unichar/hexformat|{{{1|<#salted#>}}} }} }} | <#not a Unicode code point#> }}
| name ={{{name|}}}
}}<!--

-->{{#invoke:check for unknown parameters|check
|unknown=[[Category: Pages using Unichar with unknown parameters|_VALUE_]]
|preview=[[Template:Unichar]] unknown parameter "_VALUE_"
|showblankpositional=1
|1 |hval |2 |alias |name |na |ulink |image |cwith |size |use |use2 |nlink |html |gc |note }}</includeonly><!--

--><noinclude>{{documentation}}</noinclude>

revision.comment: 1 revision imported: mass importing wikipedia templates
revision.text:
<includeonly>{{unichar/main
| hval  ={{unichar/hexformat|{{{1|<#salted#>}}} }}
| hvalinput ={{{1|}}}<!--to use in errormessage-->
| na    = {{#if:{{{alias|}}} |  {{#invoke:unicode alias|alias|{{unichar/hexformat|{{{1|}}}}}}} | {{#invoke:unicode data|lookup|name|{{unichar/hexformat|{{{1|}}}}}}}}}
| ulink ={{{ulink|<#salted#>}}}
| nlink ={{{nlink|<#salted#>}}}
| image ={{{image|}}}
| cwith ={{#if:{{{cwith|}}} | {{{cwith}}} | {{#if:{{{cwith}}} ||   }} }}
| size  ={{#if:{{{image|}}} | {{#if:{{#invoke:String|endswith|1={{lc:{{{size|}}}}}|2=px}}|{{{size}}}|10px}} | {{{size|{{#if:{{{cwith}}}|125%|150%}}}}} }}
| use   ={{lc:{{{use|unicode}}}}}
| use2  ={{{use2|}}}
| dval  ={{hex2dec|{{unichar/hexformat|{{{1|<#salted#>}}} }}|no}}
| html  ={{#ifeq:{{{html|+}}}|{{{html|-}}}|yes|no}}
| note  ={{{note|}}}
| gc    ={{#if:{{{1|}}} |{{unichar/gc|{{hex2dec|{{{1|0}}}|no}}|hval={{unichar/hexformat|{{{1|<#salted#>}}} }} }} | <#not a Unicode code point#> }}
| name ={{{name|}}}
}}<!--

-->{{#invoke:check for unknown parameters|check
|unknown=[[Category: Pages using Unichar with unknown parameters|_VALUE_]]
|preview=[[Template:Unichar]] unknown parameter "_VALUE_"
|showblankpositional=1
|1 |hval |2 |alias |name |na |ulink |image |cwith |size |use |use2 |nlink |html |gc |note }}</includeonly><!--

--><noinclude>{{documentation}}</noinclude>

revision.comment: Bot: add {{wikidata link|Q...}} or [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]
revision.text:
<includeonly>{{unichar/main
| hval  ={{unichar/hexformat|{{{1|<#salted#>}}} }}
| hvalinput ={{{1|}}}<!--to use in errormessage-->
| na    = {{#if:{{{alias|}}} |  {{#invoke:unicode alias|alias|{{unichar/hexformat|{{{1|}}}}}}} | {{#invoke:unicode data|lookup|name|{{unichar/hexformat|{{{1|}}}}}}}}}
| ulink ={{{ulink|<#salted#>}}}
| nlink ={{{nlink|<#salted#>}}}
| image ={{{image|}}}
| cwith ={{#if:{{{cwith|}}} | {{{cwith}}} | {{#if:{{{cwith}}} ||   }} }}
| size  ={{#if:{{{image|}}} | {{#if:{{#invoke:String|endswith|1={{lc:{{{size|}}}}}|2=px}}|{{{size}}}|10px}} | {{{size|{{#if:{{{cwith}}}|125%|150%}}}}} }}
| use   ={{lc:{{{use|unicode}}}}}
| use2  ={{{use2|}}}
| dval  ={{hex2dec|{{unichar/hexformat|{{{1|<#salted#>}}} }}|no}}
| html  ={{#ifeq:{{{html|+}}}|{{{html|-}}}|yes|no}}
| note  ={{{note|}}}
| gc    ={{#if:{{{1|}}} |{{unichar/gc|{{hex2dec|{{{1|0}}}|no}}|hval={{unichar/hexformat|{{{1|<#salted#>}}} }} }} | <#not a Unicode code point#> }}
| name ={{{name|}}}
}}<!--

-->{{#invoke:check for unknown parameters|check
|unknown=[[Category: Pages using Unichar with unknown parameters|_VALUE_]]
|preview=[[Template:Unichar]] unknown parameter "_VALUE_"
|showblankpositional=1
|1 |hval |2 |alias |name |na |ulink |image |cwith |size |use |use2 |nlink |html |gc |note }}</includeonly><!--

--><noinclude>{{documentation}}</noinclude>
<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>

revision.comment: imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""
revision.text:
<includeonly>{{unichar/main
| hval  ={{unichar/hexformat|{{{1|<#salted#>}}} }}
| hvalinput ={{{1|}}}<!--to use in errormessage-->
| na    = {{#if:{{{alias|}}} |  {{#invoke:unicode alias|alias|{{unichar/hexformat|{{{1|}}}}}}} | {{#invoke:unicode data|lookup|name|{{unichar/hexformat|{{{1|}}}}}}}}}
| ulink ={{{ulink|<#salted#>}}}
| nlink ={{{nlink|<#salted#>}}}
| image ={{{image|}}}
| cwith ={{#if:{{{cwith|}}} | {{{cwith}}} | {{#if:{{{cwith}}} ||   }} }}
| size  ={{#if:{{{image|}}} | {{#if:{{#invoke:String|endswith|1={{lc:{{{size|}}}}}|2=px}}|{{{size}}}|10px}} | {{{size|{{#if:{{{cwith}}}|125%|150%}}}}} }}
| use   ={{lc:{{{use|unicode}}}}}
| use2  ={{{use2|}}}
| dval  ={{hex2dec|{{unichar/hexformat|{{{1|<#salted#>}}} }}|no}}
| html  ={{#ifeq:{{{html|+}}}|{{{html|-}}}|yes|no}}
| note  ={{{note|}}}
| gc    ={{#if:{{{1|}}} |{{unichar/gc|{{hex2dec|{{{1|0}}}|no}}|hval={{unichar/hexformat|{{{1|<#salted#>}}} }} }} | <#not a Unicode code point#> }}
| name ={{{name|}}}
}}<!--

-->{{#invoke:check for unknown parameters|check
|unknown=[[Category: Pages using Unichar with unknown parameters|_VALUE_]]
|preview=[[Template:Unichar]] unknown parameter "_VALUE_"
|showblankpositional=1
|1 |hval |2 |alias |name |na |ulink |image |cwith |size |use |use2 |nlink |html |gc |note }}</includeonly><!--

--><noinclude>{{documentation}}</noinclude>

revision.comment: Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
revision.text:
<includeonly>{{unichar/main
| hval  ={{unichar/hexformat|{{{1|<#salted#>}}} }}
| hvalinput ={{{1|}}}<!--to use in errormessage-->
| na    = {{#if:{{{alias|}}} |  {{#invoke:unicode alias|alias|{{unichar/hexformat|{{{1|}}}}}}} | {{#invoke:unicode data|lookup|name|{{unichar/hexformat|{{{1|}}}}}}}}}
| ulink ={{{ulink|<#salted#>}}}
| nlink ={{{nlink|<#salted#>}}}
| image ={{{image|}}}
| cwith ={{#if:{{{cwith|}}} | {{{cwith}}} | {{#if:{{{cwith}}} ||   }} }}
| size  ={{#if:{{{image|}}} | {{#if:{{#invoke:String|endswith|1={{lc:{{{size|}}}}}|2=px}}|{{{size}}}|10px}} | {{{size|{{#if:{{{cwith}}}|125%|150%}}}}} }}
| use   ={{lc:{{{use|unicode}}}}}
| use2  ={{{use2|}}}
| dval  ={{hex2dec|{{unichar/hexformat|{{{1|<#salted#>}}} }}|no}}
| html  ={{#ifeq:{{{html|+}}}|{{{html|-}}}|yes|no}}
| note  ={{{note|}}}
| gc    ={{#if:{{{1|}}} |{{unichar/gc|{{hex2dec|{{{1|0}}}|no}}|hval={{unichar/hexformat|{{{1|<#salted#>}}} }} }} | <#not a Unicode code point#> }}
| name ={{{name|}}}
}}<!--

-->{{#invoke:check for unknown parameters|check
|unknown=[[Category: Pages using Unichar with unknown parameters|_VALUE_]]
|preview=[[Template:Unichar]] unknown parameter "_VALUE_"
|showblankpositional=1
|1 |hval |2 |alias |name |na |ulink |image |cwith |size |use |use2 |nlink |html |gc |note }}</includeonly><!--

--><noinclude>{{documentation}}</noinclude>
[[Category:Templates]]

revision.comment: Adding support for inputs like U+41
revision.text:
<includeonly>{{unichar/main
| hval  ={{unichar/hexformat|{{{1|<#salted#>}}} }}
| hvalinput ={{{1|}}}<!--to use in errormessage-->
| na    = {{#if:{{{alias|}}} |  {{#invoke:Unicode alias|alias|{{unichar/hexformat|{{{1|}}}}}}} | {{#invoke:Unicode data|lookup|name|{{unichar/hexformat|{{{1|}}}}}}}}}
| ulink ={{{ulink|<#salted#>}}}
| nlink ={{{nlink|<#salted#>}}}
| image ={{{image|}}}
| cwith ={{#if:{{{cwith|}}} | {{{cwith}}} | {{#if:{{{cwith}}} || ◌ }} }}
| suffix={{{suffix|}}}
| size  ={{#if:{{{image|}}} | {{#if:{{#invoke:String|endswith|1={{lc:{{{size|}}}}}|2=px}}|{{{size}}}|10px}} | {{{size|{{#if:{{{cwith}}}|125%|150%}}}}} }}
| use   ={{lc:{{{use|unicode}}}}}
| use2  ={{{use2|}}}
| dval  ={{hex2dec|{{unichar/hexformat|{{{1|<#salted#>}}} }}|no}}
| html  ={{#ifeq:{{{html|+}}}|{{{html|-}}}|yes|no}}
| note  ={{{note|}}}
| gc    ={{#if:{{{1|}}} |{{unichar/gc|{{hex2dec|{{unichar/hexformat|{{{1|0}}}}}|no}}|hval={{unichar/hexformat|{{{1|<#salted#>}}} }} }} | <#not a Unicode code point#> }}
| name  ={{{name|}}}
}}<!--

-->{{#invoke:Check for unknown parameters|check
|unknown=[[Category: Pages using Unichar with unknown parameters|_VALUE_]]
|preview=[[Template:Unichar]] unknown parameter "_VALUE_"
|showblankpositional=1
|1 |hval |2 |alias |name |na |ulink |image |cwith |suffix |size |use |use2 |nlink |html |gc |note }}</includeonly><!--

--><noinclude>
{{Documentation}}
</noinclude>

revision.comment: 1 revision imported: reimporting these to fix older errors
revision.text:
<includeonly>{{unichar/main
| hval  ={{unichar/hexformat|{{{1|<#salted#>}}} }}
| hvalinput ={{{1|}}}<!--to use in errormessage-->
| na    = {{#if:{{{alias|}}} |  {{#invoke:Unicode alias|alias|{{unichar/hexformat|{{{1|}}}}}}} | {{#invoke:Unicode data|lookup|name|{{unichar/hexformat|{{{1|}}}}}}}}}
| ulink ={{{ulink|<#salted#>}}}
| nlink ={{{nlink|<#salted#>}}}
| image ={{{image|}}}
| cwith ={{#if:{{{cwith|}}} | {{{cwith}}} | {{#if:{{{cwith}}} || ◌ }} }}
| suffix={{{suffix|}}}
| size  ={{#if:{{{image|}}} | {{#if:{{#invoke:String|endswith|1={{lc:{{{size|}}}}}|2=px}}|{{{size}}}|10px}} | {{{size|{{#if:{{{cwith}}}|125%|150%}}}}} }}
| use   ={{lc:{{{use|unicode}}}}}
| use2  ={{{use2|}}}
| dval  ={{hex2dec|{{unichar/hexformat|{{{1|<#salted#>}}} }}|no}}
| html  ={{#ifeq:{{{html|+}}}|{{{html|-}}}|yes|no}}
| note  ={{{note|}}}
| gc    ={{#if:{{{1|}}} |{{unichar/gc|{{hex2dec|{{unichar/hexformat|{{{1|0}}}}}|no}}|hval={{unichar/hexformat|{{{1|<#salted#>}}} }} }} | <#not a Unicode code point#> }}
| name  ={{{name|}}}
}}<!--

-->{{#invoke:Check for unknown parameters|check
|unknown=[[Category: Pages using Unichar with unknown parameters|_VALUE_]]
|preview=[[Template:Unichar]] unknown parameter "_VALUE_"
|showblankpositional=1
|1 |hval |2 |alias |name |na |ulink |image |cwith |suffix |size |use |use2 |nlink |html |gc |note }}</includeonly><!--

--><noinclude>
{{Documentation}}
</noinclude>

revision.comment: Adding support for inputs like U+41
revision.text:
<includeonly>{{unichar/main
| hval  ={{unichar/hexformat|{{{1|<#salted#>}}} }}
| hvalinput ={{{1|}}}<!--to use in errormessage-->
| na    = {{#if:{{{alias|}}} |  {{#invoke:Unicode alias|alias|{{unichar/hexformat|{{{1|}}}}}}} | {{#invoke:Unicode data|lookup|name|{{unichar/hexformat|{{{1|}}}}}}}}}
| ulink ={{{ulink|<#salted#>}}}
| nlink ={{{nlink|<#salted#>}}}
| image ={{{image|}}}
| cwith ={{#if:{{{cwith|}}} | {{{cwith}}} | {{#if:{{{cwith}}} || ◌ }} }}
| suffix={{{suffix|}}}
| size  ={{#if:{{{image|}}} | {{#if:{{#invoke:String|endswith|1={{lc:{{{size|}}}}}|2=px}}|{{{size}}}|10px}} | {{{size|{{#if:{{{cwith}}}|125%|150%}}}}} }}
| use   ={{lc:{{{use|unicode}}}}}
| use2  ={{{use2|}}}
| dval  ={{hex2dec|{{unichar/hexformat|{{{1|<#salted#>}}} }}|no}}
| html  ={{#ifeq:{{{html|+}}}|{{{html|-}}}|yes|no}}
| note  ={{{note|}}}
| gc    ={{#if:{{{1|}}} |{{unichar/gc|{{hex2dec|{{unichar/hexformat|{{{1|0}}}}}|no}}|hval={{unichar/hexformat|{{{1|<#salted#>}}} }} }} | <#not a Unicode code point#> }}
| name  ={{{name|}}}
}}<!--

-->{{#invoke:Check for unknown parameters|check
|unknown=[[Category: Pages using Unichar with unknown parameters|_VALUE_]]
|preview=[[Template:Unichar]] unknown parameter "_VALUE_"
|showblankpositional=1
|1 |hval |2 |alias |name |na |ulink |image |cwith |suffix |size |use |use2 |nlink |html |gc |note }}</includeonly><!--

--><noinclude>
{{Documentation}}
</noinclude>

<includeonly>{{unichar/main
| hval  ={{unichar/hexformat|{{{1|<#salted#>}}} }}
| hvalinput ={{{1|}}}<!--to use in errormessage-->
| na    = {{#if:{{{alias|}}} |  {{#invoke:Unicode alias|alias|{{unichar/hexformat|{{{1|}}}}}}} | {{#invoke:Unicode data|lookup|name|{{unichar/hexformat|{{{1|}}}}}}}}}
| ulink ={{{ulink|<#salted#>}}}
| nlink ={{{nlink|<#salted#>}}}
| image ={{{image|}}}
| cwith ={{#if:{{{cwith|}}} | {{{cwith}}} | {{#if:{{{cwith}}} || ◌ }} }}
| suffix={{{suffix|}}}
| size  ={{#if:{{{image|}}} | {{#if:{{#invoke:String|endswith|1={{lc:{{{size|}}}}}|2=px}}|{{{size}}}|10px}} | {{{size|{{#if:{{{cwith}}}|125%|150%}}}}} }}
| use   ={{lc:{{{use|unicode}}}}}
| use2  ={{{use2|}}}
| dval  ={{hex2dec|{{unichar/hexformat|{{{1|<#salted#>}}} }}|no}}
| html  ={{#ifeq:{{{html|+}}}|{{{html|-}}}|yes|no}}
| note  ={{{note|}}}
| gc    ={{#if:{{{1|}}} |{{unichar/gc|{{hex2dec|{{unichar/hexformat|{{{1|0}}}}}|no}}|hval={{unichar/hexformat|{{{1|<#salted#>}}} }} }} | <#not a Unicode code point#> }}
| name  ={{{name|}}}
}}<!--

-->{{#invoke:Check for unknown parameters|check
|unknown=[[Category: Pages using Unichar with unknown parameters|_VALUE_]]
|preview=[[Template:Unichar]] unknown parameter "_VALUE_"
|showblankpositional=1
|1 |hval |2 |alias |name |na |ulink |image |cwith |suffix |size |use |use2 |nlink |html |gc |note }}</includeonly><!--

--><noinclude>
{{Documentation}}
</noinclude>

revision.comment: Adding support for inputs like U+41
revision.text:
<includeonly>{{unichar/main
| hval  ={{unichar/hexformat|{{{1|<#salted#>}}} }}
| hvalinput ={{{1|}}}<!--to use in errormessage-->
| na    = {{#if:{{{alias|}}} |  {{#invoke:Unicode alias|alias|{{unichar/hexformat|{{{1|}}}}}}} | {{#invoke:Unicode data|lookup|name|{{unichar/hexformat|{{{1|}}}}}}}}}
| ulink ={{{ulink|<#salted#>}}}
| nlink ={{{nlink|<#salted#>}}}
| image ={{{image|}}}
| cwith ={{#if:{{{cwith|}}} | {{{cwith}}} | {{#if:{{{cwith}}} || ◌ }} }}
| suffix={{{suffix|}}}
| size  ={{#if:{{{image|}}} | {{#if:{{#invoke:String|endswith|1={{lc:{{{size|}}}}}|2=px}}|{{{size}}}|10px}} | {{{size|{{#if:{{{cwith}}}|125%|150%}}}}} }}
| use   ={{lc:{{{use|unicode}}}}}
| use2  ={{{use2|}}}
| dval  ={{hex2dec|{{unichar/hexformat|{{{1|<#salted#>}}} }}|no}}
| html  ={{#ifeq:{{{html|+}}}|{{{html|-}}}|yes|no}}
| note  ={{{note|}}}
| gc    ={{#if:{{{1|}}} |{{unichar/gc|{{hex2dec|{{unichar/hexformat|{{{1|0}}}}}|no}}|hval={{unichar/hexformat|{{{1|<#salted#>}}} }} }} | <#not a Unicode code point#> }}
| name  ={{{name|}}}
}}<!--

-->{{#invoke:Check for unknown parameters|check
|unknown=[[Category: Pages using Unichar with unknown parameters|_VALUE_]]
|preview=[[Template:Unichar]] unknown parameter "_VALUE_"
|showblankpositional=1
|1 |hval |2 |alias |name |na |ulink |image |cwith |suffix |size |use |use2 |nlink |html |gc |note }}</includeonly><!--

--><noinclude>
{{Documentation}}
</noinclude>

<includeonly>{{unichar/main
| hval  ={{unichar/hexformat|{{{1|<#salted#>}}} }}
| hvalinput ={{{1|}}}<!--to use in errormessage-->
| na    = {{#if:{{{alias|}}} |  {{#invoke:Unicode alias|alias|{{unichar/hexformat|{{{1|}}}}}}} | {{#invoke:Unicode data|lookup|name|{{unichar/hexformat|{{{1|}}}}}}}}}
| ulink ={{{ulink|<#salted#>}}}
| nlink ={{{nlink|<#salted#>}}}
| image ={{{image|}}}
| cwith ={{#if:{{{cwith|}}} | {{{cwith}}} | {{#if:{{{cwith}}} || ◌ }} }}
| suffix={{{suffix|}}}
| size  ={{#if:{{{image|}}} | {{#if:{{#invoke:String|endswith|1={{lc:{{{size|}}}}}|2=px}}|{{{size}}}|10px}} | {{{size|{{#if:{{{cwith}}}|125%|150%}}}}} }}
| use   ={{lc:{{{use|unicode}}}}}
| use2  ={{{use2|}}}
| dval  ={{hex2dec|{{unichar/hexformat|{{{1|<#salted#>}}} }}|no}}
| html  ={{#ifeq:{{{html|+}}}|{{{html|-}}}|yes|no}}
| note  ={{{note|}}}
| gc    ={{#if:{{{1|}}} |{{unichar/gc|{{hex2dec|{{unichar/hexformat|{{{1|0}}}}}|no}}|hval={{unichar/hexformat|{{{1|<#salted#>}}} }} }} | <#not a Unicode code point#> }}
| name  ={{{name|}}}
}}<!--

-->{{#invoke:Check for unknown parameters|check
|unknown=[[Category: Pages using Unichar with unknown parameters|_VALUE_]]
|preview=[[Template:Unichar]] unknown parameter "_VALUE_"
|showblankpositional=1
|1 |hval |2 |alias |name |na |ulink |image |cwith |suffix |size |use |use2 |nlink |html |gc |note }}</includeonly><!--

--><noinclude>
{{Documentation}}
</noinclude>

revision.comment: Bot: wrap 1 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23674194100|time triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
<includeonly>{{unichar/main
| hval  ={{unichar/hexformat|{{{1|<#salted#>}}} }}
| hvalinput ={{{1|}}}<!--to use in errormessage-->
| na    = {{#if:{{{alias|}}} |  {{#invoke:Unicode alias|alias|{{unichar/hexformat|{{{1|}}}}}}} | {{#invoke:Unicode data|lookup|name|{{unichar/hexformat|{{{1|}}}}}}}}}
| ulink ={{{ulink|<#salted#>}}}
| nlink ={{{nlink|<#salted#>}}}
| image ={{{image|}}}
| cwith ={{#if:{{{cwith|}}} | {{{cwith}}} | {{#if:{{{cwith}}} || ◌ }} }}
| suffix={{{suffix|}}}
| size  ={{#if:{{{image|}}} | {{#if:{{#invoke:String|endswith|1={{lc:{{{size|}}}}}|2=px}}|{{{size}}}|10px}} | {{{size|{{#if:{{{cwith}}}|125%|150%}}}}} }}
| use   ={{lc:{{{use|unicode}}}}}
| use2  ={{{use2|}}}
| dval  ={{hex2dec|{{unichar/hexformat|{{{1|<#salted#>}}} }}|no}}
| html  ={{#ifeq:{{{html|+}}}|{{{html|-}}}|yes|no}}
| note  ={{{note|}}}
| gc    ={{#if:{{{1|}}} |{{unichar/gc|{{hex2dec|{{unichar/hexformat|{{{1|0}}}}}|no}}|hval={{unichar/hexformat|{{{1|<#salted#>}}} }} }} | <#not a Unicode code point#> }}
| name  ={{{name|}}}
}}<!--

-->{{#invoke:Check for unknown parameters|check
|unknown=|preview=[[Template:Unichar]] unknown parameter "_VALUE_"
|showblankpositional=1
|1 |hval |2 |alias |name |na |ulink |image |cwith |suffix |size |use |use2 |nlink |html |gc |note }}</includeonly><!--

--><noinclude>
{{Documentation}}
</noinclude>
<noinclude>
[[Category: Pages using Unichar with unknown parameters|_VALUE_]]
[[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]]
</noinclude>

<includeonly>{{unichar/main
| hval  ={{unichar/hexformat|{{{1|<#salted#>}}} }}
| hvalinput ={{{1|}}}<!--to use in errormessage-->
| na    = {{#if:{{{alias|}}} |  {{#invoke:Unicode alias|alias|{{unichar/hexformat|{{{1|}}}}}}} | {{#invoke:Unicode data|lookup|name|{{unichar/hexformat|{{{1|}}}}}}}}}
| ulink ={{{ulink|<#salted#>}}}
| nlink ={{{nlink|<#salted#>}}}
| image ={{{image|}}}
| cwith ={{#if:{{{cwith|}}} | {{{cwith}}} | {{#if:{{{cwith}}} || ◌ }} }}
| suffix={{{suffix|}}}
| size  ={{#if:{{{image|}}} | {{#if:{{#invoke:String|endswith|1={{lc:{{{size|}}}}}|2=px}}|{{{size}}}|10px}} | {{{size|{{#if:{{{cwith}}}|125%|150%}}}}} }}
| use   ={{lc:{{{use|unicode}}}}}
| use2  ={{{use2|}}}
| dval  ={{hex2dec|{{unichar/hexformat|{{{1|<#salted#>}}} }}|no}}
| html  ={{#ifeq:{{{html|+}}}|{{{html|-}}}|yes|no}}
| note  ={{{note|}}}
| gc    ={{#if:{{{1|}}} |{{unichar/gc|{{hex2dec|{{unichar/hexformat|{{{1|0}}}}}|no}}|hval={{unichar/hexformat|{{{1|<#salted#>}}} }} }} | <#not a Unicode code point#> }}
| name  ={{{name|}}}
}}<!--

-->{{#invoke:Check for unknown parameters|check
|unknown=|preview=[[Template:Unichar]] unknown parameter "_VALUE_"
|showblankpositional=1
|1 |hval |2 |alias |name |na |ulink |image |cwith |suffix |size |use |use2 |nlink |html |gc |note }}</includeonly><!--

--><noinclude>
{{Documentation}}

[[Category: Pages using Unichar with unknown parameters|_VALUE_]]
[[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]]
</noinclude>

<includeonly>{{unichar/main
| hval  ={{unichar/hexformat|{{{1|<#salted#>}}} }}
| hvalinput ={{{1|}}}<!--to use in errormessage-->
| na    = {{#if:{{{alias|}}} |  {{#invoke:Unicode alias|alias|{{unichar/hexformat|{{{1|}}}}}}} | {{#invoke:Unicode data|lookup|name|{{unichar/hexformat|{{{1|}}}}}}}}}
| ulink ={{{ulink|<#salted#>}}}
| nlink ={{{nlink|<#salted#>}}}
| image ={{{image|}}}
| cwith ={{#if:{{{cwith|}}} | {{{cwith}}} | {{#if:{{{cwith}}} || ◌ }} }}
| suffix={{{suffix|}}}
| size  ={{#if:{{{image|}}} | {{#if:{{#invoke:String|endswith|1={{lc:{{{size|}}}}}|2=px}}|{{{size}}}|10px}} | {{{size|{{#if:{{{cwith}}}|125%|150%}}}}} }}
| use   ={{lc:{{{use|unicode}}}}}
| use2  ={{{use2|}}}
| dval  ={{hex2dec|{{unichar/hexformat|{{{1|<#salted#>}}} }}|no}}
| html  ={{#ifeq:{{{html|+}}}|{{{html|-}}}|yes|no}}
| note  ={{{note|}}}
| gc    ={{unichar/gc|{{hex2dec|{{unichar/hexformat|{{{1|0}}}}}|no}}|hval={{unichar/hexformat|{{{1|<#salted#>}}} }} }}
| name  ={{{name|}}}
}}<!--

-->{{#invoke:Check for unknown parameters|check
|unknown=[[Category: Pages using Unichar with unknown parameters|_VALUE_]]
|preview=[[Template:Unichar]] unknown parameter "_VALUE_"
|showblankpositional=1
|1 |hval |2 |alias |name |na |ulink |image |cwith |suffix |size |use |use2 |nlink |html |gc |note }}</includeonly><!--

--><noinclude>
{{Documentation}}
</noinclude>

revision.comment: 1 revision imported: trying to do a last fix of these, they will be fixed and not bloat the site
revision.text:
<includeonly>{{unichar/main

revision.comment: Bot: strip HTML comments [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24999656626|time triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
<includeonly>{{unichar/main
| hval  ={{unichar/hexformat|{{{1|<#salted#>}}} }}
| hvalinput ={{{1|}}}
| na    = {{#if:{{{alias|}}} |  {{#invoke:Unicode alias|alias|{{unichar/hexformat|{{{1|}}}}}}} | {{#invoke:Unicode data|lookup|name|{{unichar/hexformat|{{{1|}}}}}}}}}
| ulink ={{{ulink|<#salted#>}}}
| nlink ={{{nlink|<#salted#>}}}
| image ={{{image|}}}
| cwith ={{#if:{{{cwith|}}} | {{{cwith}}} | {{#if:{{{cwith}}} || ◌ }} }}
| suffix={{{suffix|}}}
| size  ={{#if:{{{image|}}} | {{#if:{{#invoke:String|endswith|1={{lc:{{{size|}}}}}|2=px}}|{{{size}}}|10px}} | {{{size|{{#if:{{{cwith}}}|125%|150%}}}}} }}
| use   ={{lc:{{{use|unicode}}}}}
| use2  ={{{use2|}}}
| dval  ={{hex2dec|{{unichar/hexformat|{{{1|<#salted#>}}} }}|no}}
| html  ={{#ifeq:{{{html|+}}}|{{{html|-}}}|yes|no}}
| note  ={{{note|}}}
| gc    ={{unichar/gc|{{hex2dec|{{unichar/hexformat|{{{1|0}}}}}|no}}|hval={{unichar/hexformat|{{{1|<#salted#>}}} }} }}
| name  ={{{name|}}}
}}{{#invoke:Check for unknown parameters|check

|preview=[[Template:Unichar]] unknown parameter "_VALUE_"
|showblankpositional=1
